name: Insurance Australia Group Limited
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$7.8048. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry A$7.8048, stop A$7.3606, target A$7.8910. Risk/reward is 0.19:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
